name: Physical Release Guard
description: Automatically manages a configurable tag for movies and series based on TMDb physical release data.
overview: Scans your movie and series libraries and adds or removes a configurable tag based on whether a physical release exists according to TMDb data. Movies use TMDb physical release dates; series use TMDb DVD/physical episode-group evidence.

versions.changelog: Auto-block tag for new users in Parental Control. Adds Parental Control section with toggle and apply-to-all-users button.
Adds configurable scan schedule UI, dry-run mode for previewing changes, and preferred region filtering for TMDb physical releases.
Prevents concurrent library scans. Scan Now buttons disable while a scan is running and re-enable when it completes.
Adds configurable movie and series exclusions so selected titles are skipped and left untouched by the Hidden tag scan.
Adds configurable tag name so users can choose which tag the plugin manages instead of the hardcoded 'Hidden' tag.
Adds per-library configuration including enable/disable toggle and custom tag name per library.
Adds auto-scan for new items with configurable toggle in settings.
Adds per-library scan buttons on the config page to trigger a scan for a single library.
